item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
config='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json'
doc='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md'
python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open(\"longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json\", encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert d[\"mode\"] == \"audit\" and type(d[\"mode\"]) is str; print(\"json_mode=audit PASS\")'
grep -Fq 'Audit mode records policy-check results for reviewer inspection.' \""'$doc"
if grep -Hin '"'strict' \""'$config" "$doc"; then exit 1; fi
[ "$(tail -n 1 "$doc")" = '"'Internal rehearsal only.' ]
printf 'audit_documentation=PASS\\nsuperseded_mode_absent=PASS\\nfinal_line=PASS\\n'"

/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
config='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json'
doc='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md'
python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open(\"longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json\", encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert d[\"mode\"] == \"audit\" and type(d[\"mode\"]) is str; print(\"json_mode=audit PASS\")'
grep -Fq 'Audit mode records policy-check results for reviewer inspection.' \""'$doc"
if grep -Hin '"'strict' \""'$config" "$doc"; then exit 1; fi
[ "$(tail -n 1 "$doc")" = '"'Internal rehearsal only.' ]
printf 'audit_documentation=PASS\\nsuperseded_mode_absent=PASS\\nfinal_line=PASS\\n'"
